name: repeated_window_summary
primary_question: What admitted receipt activity was observed in each bounded date window without inferring change, recurrence, or one global score?
derivation_rule: group admitted receipts by the calendar-date prefix of observed_at and conserve per-window receipt, object, event-kind, selected-event, and evidence-ref counts
owner_truth_inputs: owner-local receipts across the active registry
authority_ceiling: Weaker than the underlying receipt feed and any owner-local chronology or closeout record.
